mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds caller chain into edge-map index, making the false side of cmsIsMatrixShaper a new (call-context, edge) bucket distinct from the already-covered true side, rewarding retention of non-matrix-shaper profile inputs naive discards.
one_line: context-indexed edge map creates new bucket for false-branch under novel caller chain

mechanism_summary: CtxHook indexes IHDR-validation edges by call context, so each distinct caller path to OSS_FUZZ_png_check_IHDR is a new coverage bucket, preserving more intermediate IHDR-shaped inputs and raising the chance havoc assembles the forbidden color_type/bit_depth combination.
one_line: call-context edge indexing retains diverse IHDR-parsing intermediates to eventually assemble forbidden combination

mechanism_summary: CtxHook splits the FP-parser state-machine edges by call context, so each distinct caller path through png_check_fp_number is a new bucket; this retains intermediate parse-state seeds (sign, digit, first-dot) and lets havoc eventually emit the second dot needed to hit the two-dot true branch.
one_line: context-indexed edges retain FP-parser intermediate states, enabling rare second-dot true branch

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the same FP-case-ladder edges new coverage under each distinct call context, rewarding progressively deeper traversal of digits-E-sign sequence that bare per-edge feedback saturates on, allowing accumulation of the multi-character state chain reaching the exponent-plus-sign arm.
one_line: context-indexed edges reward deeper exponent-sign parser state sequence naive's flat map saturates

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the line-833 edge a new bucket under the trailing-IDAT call context that naive's flat map already considers covered, providing the retention credit that preserves the trailing-zero-length-IDAT input and lets it be mutated toward the false side.

mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds call context into edge-map index so reaching the PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE case via a new caller chain is new coverage; this preserves more IHDR-shaped corpus entries whose havoc mutation can land 0x03 at color_type offset 0x19.
one_line: context-indexed edges preserve IHDR-shaped inputs until havoc places palette color_type byte

mechanism_summary: CtxHook registers gAMA-handler edges under each caller-chain hash as a distinct coverage bucket, retaining intermediate corpus entries that bring the fuzzer to the gAMA length comparison; plain per-edge naive never builds this corpus scaffolding and cannot mutate the length off 4.
one_line: call-context indexing retains intermediate corpus steps toward gAMA handler enabling length!=4 branch

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the same sBIT-handler edge new coverage under each distinct call path, retaining more intermediate inputs whose IHDR color_type can be havoc-mutated toward the palette value 3; flat-edge naive collapses these paths and discards the intermediates.
one_line: context-indexed edges retain near-palette IHDR inputs until havoc places color_type=3

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the chunk-dispatch edge into png_handle_sRGB new coverage per distinct call context, preserving intermediate seeds that progress toward the sRGB chunk; bare-edge naive discards re-traversals and never retains the stepping stones to reach length!=1.
one_line: call-context edge coverage preserves chunk-dispatch stepping stones toward sRGB length!=1 branch

mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds caller chain into edge-map index so reaching the bKGD palette comparison via a new call context is new coverage, preserving intermediate inputs whose havoc mutation can land color_type=3 at offset 0x19; naive lacks this retention gradient.

mechanism_summary: CtxHook gives every call path through png_handle_sCAL and png_read_buffer its own edge-map bucket, so the allocation-failure sub-state traversal registers as new coverage and the corpus is steered toward the heap state that makes the buffer return NULL; bare-edge naive never rewards this sub-path.

mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds the caller chain into the edge-map index, making the tIME-dispatch edge under its caller chain a fresh (call-context, edge) bucket that plain naive's bare map already marks covered.

mechanism_summary: CtxHook re-indexes the png_read_buffer edge per call path, so large-length zTXt inputs that force a NULL allocation earn new (call-context, edge) coverage that bare-edge naive's saturated map never rewards.

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the iTXt-handler loop edges count as new coverage when reached via the chunk-dispatch call path, preserving intermediate iTXt seeds that naive's context-blind map prunes as already-covered.

mechanism_summary: CtxHook gives each caller-chain pass into png_handle_iTXt its own edge-map slot, accumulating corpus pressure on the compression-flag/length combination that naive's flat map never rewards.

mechanism_summary: CtxHook folds caller-chain context into edge slots, retaining more chunk-valid intermediates from which havoc can mutate color_type to 3; naive's flat edge map gives no extra credit for distinct call contexts.

mechanism_summary: CtxHook makes the xmlFreeNode edge reached via the text/comment-node teardown path a new bucket, while naive's bare map already saw that edge via name-node frees and awards no additional reward.
